---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **App version:** (visible in the footer of the landing page or in the title bar)
- **Download type:** (e.g. .exe, .dmg, .AppImage)
